abilities.scope: any tenant member — Organizations are discoverable to every member because the frontend picker depends on them
admin + owner. Additional gates: (a) organization_slot cap; (b) organization_hierarchy entitlement when parent_id is set
admin + owner. Branding-column writes require organization_branding entitlement (checked in the branding-update ability)
admin + owner. Refused on is_default OR has descendants OR referenced by branches
admin + owner. Requires organization_reparent entitlement. Distinct from `update` because reparenting has extra audit weight
admin + owner. Refused on is_default OR has descendants OR referenced by branches
admin + owner + entitlement organization_branding. Ability short-circuits with ORGANIZATION_BRANDING_NOT_ENTITLED when the entitlement is missing

before_hooks.purpose: Short-circuit on the super_admin bypass (platform-plane) and on `is_default` guards (tenant-plane). Ensures ability checks fail with ORGANIZATION_IS_DEFAULT BEFORE evaluating permission strings — surfaces the meaningful error rather than 403
